name: claude-superpack
description: Deterministic parallel task orchestration for Claude Code with decomposition, conflict checks, and isolated worker execution.

interface.shortDescription: Parallel planning and isolated worker execution for Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Claude Superpack adds a planner-worker flow to Claude Code through native skills and a safe execution runner that prefers git worktrees and falls back to filtered filesystem copies.
defaultPrompt: Fix a bug, add tests, and update docs safely.
Split this request into low-conflict workstreams.
Run parallel workers with isolated worktrees.
